entries.name: Cedar Colossus
entries.information: Always drops a "fair" chest worth around 100c. Every 100 frames (20 seconds), it casts up to three roots to ensnare targeted exiles, rendering them unable to move, including an inability to heal or be healed, for roughly 8 seconds (roughly 40 frames, timed). The root damage starts out slow and accelerates, doing only about 10 Darkus of damage in the first 10 frames, but accelerating quickly to around 75 Darkus/frame for the next 30 frames. The entire root does about 180 Higgrus worth of damage (1800 Darkus).

entries.difficulty: Extremely dangerous due to the root ensnaring. Darkus is measured (this is just for the swings, not the roots). Atkus to hit is measured.

entries.name: Gho Shadow
entries.information: Cannot be studied. Level is measured. Name is arbitrarily given. (Alternative proposed names are "Gho", "Shadow King" and "Shadow Lizard", we'll see what sticks). One of the most dangerous monsters of the Haunted Fane. If it kills an exile, it summons a "ghost" of them to assist in attacking exiles, similar to the Possessed Amakua — except the ghost is separated from the exile's spirit and remains after the exile is healed. Appears to be an insect, regarding family bonus, and not an insubstantial undine.

entries.difficulty: Very scary!

(move fallen). Two types of fire magic - an extremely long-range instant fire (20 Darkus of damage, every 40 frames) AND a moderately long range "slow" fire burst (140 Darkus of damage, also every ~60 frames, high variability, in addition to the regular fire).

entries.difficulty: Darkus is measured. Histia is well-estimated.

entries.name: Windswept Fervor
entries.information: CV is meaningless, like the Arboreal and Torched Fervors, they take the strengths of nearby exiles.
entries.difficulty: Tremendous variation in strength in all strengths since they take the training of a nearby exile to copy. Thus, numbers are meaningless.

entries.name: Winged Snake
entries.information: Come in pink and green varieties. [CV is calculated for green.]
entries.rarity: Medium for pink snakes, common for green snakes. The pink snakes are significantly stronger.
entries.difficulty: The two colors have very different strengths. The pink snake swings every 12 frames, the green snake has swings every 6. Atkus to hit is measured (same for both snakes). Darkus is measured (20 for green, 50 for pink). Histia is measured. Defense to brick is measured for the green snake.

entries.name: Withering Priestess
entries.location: Gho-Wei Island Haunted Forest, Haunted Fane
entries.information: Area effect spirit drain on fighters, for those within roughly 6 exile lengths. Tons of Troilus. Drops a "fair" chest. [Level is estimated.]
entries.worth_range: "Fair" Chest: Around 100 coins per person [~100% chance]. The "fair" chest does not split based on number of people (i.e. 2 people = chest is 200c total; 10 people = chest is 1000c total)
entries.difficulty: The fighter spirit drain and difficulty to hit can cause problems, especially if in a group of other monsters. Very difficult to hit.

entries.name: Wizard Q'vynn
entries.location: Land of Dank Believe (Skybrary - Boss Zone)
entries.information: Has three forms that must be killed in succession: first an undisclosed, then a greenish unique 'Noth, and finally a spriggin. Shoots lightning. Can split into two, like Giayl. Can move between snells on its own free will. [CV is calculated for first form - 1850 - and second form - 2400 - and measured for final form - 3435].
entries.difficulty: Darkus is measured for the spriggin form.

entries.information: Has a shield on by default that can be disabled by a healer touching the shield. When the shield is down, exiles can attack. Shield goes up again quickly if not under constant attack. [CV is guessed]
